title: Keith Bagley Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Keith Bagley Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Keith Bagley
Khoury Faculty
MS in Computer Science, Howard University
Career Changer
Much like the Align students he teaches, Keith Bagley moved between careers before eventually pursuing his master’s in computer science. Now as the Director of Align Boston, he works hard to ensure that students are able to succeed in their own career transitions.
The whole purpose of Align is to broaden participation. We welcome any and everyone.
… That mission and that whole theme is what ties me closely to Align and to Khoury
Keith Bagley, Director of Align Boston
Explore all Khoury Stories
